description: Module add scheduled — customer added Newsletter from the dashboard, effective next billing date; shows per-module line (£49 setup + £9/mo) plus old/new subscription totals (locked 2026-05-25 prices)

expected.subject: Got it — Newsletter scheduled for 2026-06-01
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Quick confirmation — your module change is queued.

You are ADDING: Newsletter
  • One-off setup for this module: +£49
    (lands on your 2026-06-01 invoice)
  • Module subscription: +£9/month
    (starts 2026-06-01)

Your subscription:
  • Today:                  £29/month
  • From 2026-06-01: £38/month (+£9)

Setup paid historically: £299 (non-refundable
under any module change or cancellation — covers the site
build, already delivered).

What happens between now and then:
  • Your subscription stays the same until 2026-06-01.
  • On 2026-06-01: your invoice picks up the one-off
    setup above PLUS the new monthly rate.
  • Newsletter activates the same day so you can start
    using it straight away.

Changed your mind? Just open your dashboard and remove the
pending change. Anything done by you before the effective
date is reversible from there.

— ModuForge
